---
title: "Session Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
params:
  session_id: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4, dpi = 120)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)

ANALYTICS_HOME <- Sys.getenv("ANALYTICS_HOME", ".")
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "config.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "scripts", "utils.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "session_analysis.R"))
source(file.path(ANALYTICS_HOME, "analysis", "change_point_detection.R"))

session_id <- params$session_id

sa <- tryCatch(
  session_analysis(session_id),
  error = function(e) list(
    session_meta    = data.frame(course_code="N/A", course_title="N/A",
                                 lecturer_name="N/A", actual_start="N/A"),
    n_present       = 0,
    engagement_timeline = data.frame(),
    conc_heatmap    = data.frame(),
    emotion_dist    = data.frame(),
    alerts          = data.frame()
  )
)

cp <- tryCatch(change_point_detection(session_id), error = function(e) list(changepoints = c()))

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 11))
```

<div style="background:#1E3A5F;color:white;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:20px">
<strong>Course:</strong> `r sa$session_meta$course_code[1]` – `r sa$session_meta$course_title[1]`<br>
<strong>Lecturer:</strong> `r sa$session_meta$lecturer_name[1]`<br>
<strong>Start:</strong> `r sa$session_meta$actual_start[1]` &nbsp;·&nbsp;
<strong>Students Present:</strong> `r sa$n_present`
</div>

## 1. Engagement Timeline

```{r eng-timeline}
et <- sa$engagement_timeline
if (!is.null(et) && nrow(et) > 0) {
  cp_times <- tryCatch(as.POSIXct(cp$changepoints), error = function(e) c())
  p <- ggplot(et, aes(x = captured_at, y = engagement_val)) +
    geom_line(colour = "#BDD7EE", linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_line(aes(y = smooth_eng), colour = "#1565C0", linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
    labs(x = "Time", y = "Engagement",
         title = "Class Engagement Over Session",
         subtitle = "Blue = 5-snapshot rolling average")
  if (length(cp_times) > 0)
    p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(cp_times),
                        linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", alpha = 0.6)
  print(p)
} else {
  cat("No engagement data recorded for this session.")
}
```

## 2. Per-Student Concentration

```{r conc-heatmap}
ch <- sa$conc_heatmap
if (!is.null(ch) && nrow(ch) > 0) {
  ggplot(ch, aes(x = reorder(student_name, avg_conc), y = 1, fill = avg_conc)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white") +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#EF5350", high = "#66BB6A", limits = c(0, 100), name = "Focus") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "Student", y = "", title = "Per-Student Average Concentration") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
} else {
  cat("No per-student concentration data for this session.")
}
```

## 3. Emotion Distribution

```{r emo-dist}
ed <- sa$emotion_dist
if (!is.null(ed) && nrow(ed) > 0) {
  emo_pal <- c(happy="#27AE60", engaged="#2980B9", neutral="#95A5A6",
               confused="#F39C12", sad="#8E44AD", angry="#E74C3C",
               surprised="#16A085", fearful="#E67E22", disgusted="#5D6D7E")
  ggplot(ed, aes(x = reorder(emotion, -count), y = count, fill = emotion)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, width = 0.55) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = emo_pal) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Snapshots", title = "Emotion Distribution")
} else {
  cat("No emotion data for this session.")
}
```

## 4. Alerts

```{r alerts}
al <- sa$alerts
if (!is.null(al) && nrow(al) > 0) {
  keep <- intersect(c("alert_type","severity","message","triggered_at"), colnames(al))
  kable(al[, keep, drop = FALSE], col.names = c("Type","Severity","Message","Triggered At"))
} else {
  cat("No alerts during this session.")
}
```

## 5. Summary

```{r summary}
cat(if (length(cp$changepoints) > 0)
  paste0("Engagement shift(s) detected at: ",
         paste(format(as.POSIXct(cp$changepoints), "%H:%M"), collapse = ", "))
else
  "No significant engagement change points detected — consistent engagement throughout.")
```

---
*EduVision Analytics · `r format(Sys.time(), "%d %B %Y %H:%M")`*
